pokemon:thwackey.name: Thwackey
pokemon:thwackey.summary: When it’s drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won’t even notice that it’s already knocked out its opponent.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When it’s drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won’t even notice that it’s already knocked out its opponent.
The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When it’s drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won’t even notice that it’s already knocked out its opponent.

pokemon:rillaboom.name: Rillaboom
pokemon:rillaboom.summary: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.
By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.

pokemon:grookey.name: Grookey
pokemon:grookey.summary: It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped.
When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped.
